text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is here at<n>last! I'm so
focused I can't even look<n>at the other
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Except for King, who's radiant as a<n>phoenix. As
expected, she's stolen<n>my attention—nay, my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: When I think about how I'll be able tolook into the depths of King...Drool... ☆ All right! Okay! Let's treatit like any other race!
